In [25]:
import os
list1=[]
for i , j, k in os.walk(path):
    if len(k)>0:
        file = os.path.join(str(i)+ "\\" +str(k[0]))
        list1.append(file)
        
print(list1)

    with open (r'{}'.format(i),"r" ,encoding = "utf-8") as txt:
        f = txt.readlines()
        finallist.append(f)

  '00:20:59\tAbdul Nadeem Mohd:\tMarketing is the process of promoting, selling, and distributing a product or service to potential customers. It involves understanding customer needs and desires, developing products or services that fulfill those needs, pricing them appropriately, and then making them accessible to the target audience through various channels\n',

  '00:20:58\tAbhishek Ganeshkar:\tI think it is skill to marketing our products or services\n',
  '00:20:59\tAbdul Nadeem Mohd:\tMarketing is the process of promoting, selling, and distributing a product or service to potential customers. It involves understanding customer needs and desires, developing products or services that fulfill those needs, pricing them appropriately, and then making them accessible to the target audience through various channels\n',
  '00:21:00\tDarshan Gowda M:\tto sell\n',

  '00:20:58\tAbhishek Ganeshkar:\tI think it is skill to marketing our products or services\n',
  '00:20:59\tAbdul Nadeem Mohd:\tMarketing is the process of promoting, selling, and distributing a product or service to potential customers. It involves understanding customer needs and desires, developing products or services that fulfill those needs, pricing them appropriately, and then making them accessible to the target audience through various channels\n',
  '00:21:00\tDarshan Gowda M:\tto sell\n',
  '00:21:00\tSRK Teja Nidumukkala:\tTo standout\n',
  '00:21:00\tRutuja Dhavale:\tCommunication\n',

  'brand\n',

  '00:20:57\tArthi Sri Sowmya Mogulluru:\tSkillset\n',
  '00:20:57\tSohil Sharma:\tBrand\n',
  '00:20:58\tAbhishek Ganeshkar:\tI think it is skill to marketing our products or services\n',
  '00:20:59\tAbdul Nadeem Mohd:\tMarketing is the process of promoting, selling, and distributing a product or service to potential customers. It involves understanding customer needs and desires, developing products or services that fulfill those needs, pricing them appropriately, and then making them accessible to the target audience through various channels\n',
  '00:21:00\tDarshan Gowda M:\tto sell\n',
  '00:21:00\tSRK Teja Nidumukkala:\tTo standout\n',
  '00:21:00\tRutuja Dhavale:\tCommunication\n',
  '00:21:00\tVAISHNAVI SINGH:\tskillset\n',
  '00:21:01\tShraddha Kalaskar:\tProfit\n',
  '00:21:02\tSatyaprakash Sahoo:\tto sell\n',
  '00:21:03\tB Shivakrishna:\tit is orocessing of selling products\n',
  '00:21:03\tAashish Kasar:\texposer\n',
  '\n',
  'brand\n',
  '00:21:03\tPavan Kumar Reddy Banavasi:\tdatascience directly prportional to marketing\n',
  '00:21:04\tKartik Dhanai:\tTo showcase our idea\n',
  '00:21:04\tMD SAMEERA:\tpromoting\n',
  '00:21:12\tGarimella Aparna Devi:\tability to promote\n',
  '00:21:13\tShubham Prajapati:\tReaching the right audience\n',
  '00:21:13\tSurineni Abhi:\tPromoting\n',
  '00:21:13\tAnushka Yeole:\tselling ur product\n',
  '00:21:13\tSubhadra Bhupathiraju:\tShowcasing ourself\n',
  '00:21:13\tDeepak kumar:\tto show ourself\n',
  '00:21:13\tPRASHANTH E:\tHighlighting\n',
  '00:21:13\tVishvaas Swaminathan:\tMarketing is the process of promoting and selling products or services to customers. It involves strategies like advertising, branding, and market research. I\n',

  '00:21:14\tHannah Igboke:\tMarketing is simply sales. How to sell yourself and what you do to others in order to get a job and be paid adequately for it.\n',
  '00:21:14\tSohil Sharma:\tIf a company fires you, more companies should hire you\n',
  "00:21:14\tSai Krishna Dusa:\tIt's a skillset. Marketing is the skill of getting your product known to a set of customers by using effective strategies. I imporves overall sales of a product\n",

  '00:21:13\tPRASHANTH E:\tHighlighting\n',
  '00:21:13\tVishvaas Swaminathan:\tMarketing is the process of promoting and selling products or services to customers. It involves strategies like advertising, branding, and market research. I\n',
  '00:21:14\tBADISHAGANDU RAVINDER:\tto promote our delf\n',
  '00:21:14\tPranav Bhawsar:\tto present yourself out performing from crowd\n',

  '00:21:14\tRadhika Aggarwal:\tto promote our skills\n',
  '00:21:14\tHannah Igboke:\tMarketing is simply sales. How to sell yourself and what you do to others in order to get a job and be paid adequately for it.\n',
  '00:21:14\tSohil Sharma:\tIf a company fires you, more companies should hire you\n',
  "00:21:14\tSai Krishna Dusa:\tIt's a skillset. Marketing is the skill of getting your product known to a set of customers by using effective strategies. I imporves overall sales of a product\n",
  "00:21:15\tSai Krishna Dusa:\tIt's a skillset. Marketing is the skill of getting your product known to a set of customers by using effective strategies. I imporves overall sales of a product\n",

In [28]:
message=[]
for i in finallist:
    for j in i:
        
        m=re.findall(':\\t(\w.+)',j)
        if(m):
            message.append(m[0])
        else:
            message.append(np.nan)
